mapper.select: SELECT STORE_ID AS storeId, STORE_CODE AS storeCode, STORE_NAME AS storeName, PHONE AS phone, ADDRESS AS address, OWNER_USER_NO AS ownerUserNo, STATUS AS status FROM STORES WHERE OWNER_USER_NO = #{ownerUserNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STORE_INVENTORIES WHERE CURRENT_QUANTITY < SAFETY_QUANTITY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS WHERE STATUS = 'APPROVED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS WHERE STATUS = 'REQUESTED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INQUIRIES WHERE ANSWER_CONTENT IS NULL AND DELETED_AT IS NULL

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT M.MATERIAL_NAME AS materialName, SI.CURRENT_QUANTITY AS currentQuantity, SI.SAFETY_QUANTITY AS safetyQuantity FROM STORE_INVENTORIES SI JOIN MATERIALS M ON SI.MATERIAL_ID = M.MATERIAL_ID WHERE SI.CURRENT_QUANTITY < SI.SAFETY_QUANTITY ORDER BY (SI.SAFETY_QUANTITY - SI.CURRENT_QUANTITY) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID AS receiptId, MIN(POI.MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT) AS materialName, COUNT(*) - 1 AS extraCount FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS PO JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS POI ON PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID WHERE PO.STATUS = 'APPROVED' GROUP BY PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID ORDER BY PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT STATUS AS status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS WHERE STATUS IN ('REQUESTED', 'PARTIALLY_APPROVED') GROUP BY STATUS ORDER BY CASE STATUS WHEN 'REQUESTED' THEN 1 WHEN 'PARTIALLY_APPROVED' THEN 2 END

SELECT STORE_CLOSING_ID AS closingNo, TO_CHAR(BUSINESS_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS businessDate, CLOSING_MEMO AS closingMemo, TO_CHAR(CLOSED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS closingDate FROM STORE_CLOSINGS WHERE TRUNC(BUSINESS_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TITLE AS noticeTitle, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdAt FROM NOTICES WHERE DELETED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT M.MATERIAL_CODE AS materialCode, M.MATERIAL_TYPE AS materialType, POI.MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT AS materialName, POI.APPROVED_QUANTITY AS approvedQuantity, POI.SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT AS supplyPrice, POI.APPROVED_QUANTITY * POI.SUPPLY_PRICE_SNAPSHOT AS amount FROM PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS POI JOIN MATERIALS M ON M.MATERIAL_ID = POI.MATERIAL_ID WHERE POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = #{purchaseId} ORDER BY POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEM_ID
